newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The substantive 2026 events (water-management divestment of ~EUR 650M leaving NORMA net-debt-free, Q1 margin improvement, ~EUR 52.8M buyback, FY2026 guidance of 0-2% sales growth and 2-4% adj. EBIT margin) all predate the window. No new evidence linking its fluid connectors/clamps to AI liquid-cooling or data-center demand.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent-node thesis (engineered joining/fluid connectors usable in liquid loops and compact manifolds) is unchanged with no in-window evidence tying NORMA to AI liquid-cooling or data-center demand. Balance-sheet cleanup is old news. Hold at 16, 0.
verdicts.bull: Net-debt-free post-divestment; connectors could serve liquid-cooling manifolds.
verdicts.neutral: AI/data-center linkage remains speculative; soft auto demand.
verdicts.bear: Core end-markets (auto/industrial) cyclical; thin FY EBIT margin guide.
